title: Add deployment enable gate
goal: Avoid noisy or unsafe push-to-main deployment attempts before the first GCP and GitHub environment setup is complete.
scope: Keep the full verification workflow running on main.
Skip automatic staging and production deploys until DEPLOY_ENABLED=true is configured.
Allow manual workflow_dispatch deploys for intentional first launch runs.
Document the repository variable required to enable automatic deployments.
verification: Deploy workflow keeps the verify job active for pushes to main.
Deploy jobs run when workflow_dispatch is used.
Deploy jobs run on push only when DEPLOY_ENABLED is true.
CI/CD documentation describes the gate and first-launch behavior.
completed_notes: Added a Deployment disabled job that explains why push-to-main deployment did not run.
Gated deploy-staging behind workflow_dispatch or DEPLOY_ENABLED=true.
Documented DEPLOY_ENABLED in the CI/CD guide.
